allow: Bash(python -c "from PIL import Image; im = Image.open\('assets/ziglabit-dark.png'\); print\(im.size, im.mode\)")

Bash(python -c "from PIL import Image; im = Image.open\('assets/ziglabit-dark.png'\); print\('dark:', im.size, im.mode\); im2 = Image.open\('assets/ziglabit-light.png'\); print\('light:', im2.size, im2.mode\)")
